props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggle the disabled state for the component.

props.name: preventDefault
props.description: Prevent the browser's default behavior when the configured shortcut matches.

props.name: shortcut
props.description: Comma-separated shortcut list. The component matches all configured shortcuts and renders the platform-preferred one.

events.name: click
events.description: Event called when the user clicks on the component.

events.name: trigger
events.description: Event called when the component is activated by click or keyboard shortcut.
